subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: There was once a Governor in Ancient Syria, who had a beautiful and clever wife.
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @stories; anecdotes
